Convites.title: Invitations
Convites.subtitle: Invite investors by email. Registration requires an invitation.

Aceitar.title: Create your account
Aceitar.subtitle: Set your password to complete registration.
Aceitar.name: Name
Aceitar.acceptTerms: I accept the terms, and acknowledge the risk and illiquidity of the investment.
Aceitar.invalidBody: This invitation does not exist, has already been used, or has expired. Please contact TILWENI for a new invitation.

errors.terms: You must accept the terms to continue.
errors.weak_password: The password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.invalid: This invitation is no longer valid.
errors.email_taken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Mfa.title: Two-step verification
Mfa.enrollHint: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password) and enter the 6-digit code.
Mfa.challengeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

Kyc.title: Identity verification
Kyc.intro: To access the projects, we need to verify your identity.
Kyc.consent: I authorise the processing of my documents for identity verification (KYC) purposes, under the privacy policy.
Kyc.consentRequired: You must give consent to continue.
Kyc.submitError: Could not submit. Check the details and try again.
Kyc.pending: Your documents are under review. We will notify you once verification is complete.
Kyc.rejectedRetry: Your previous verification was not accepted. Please resubmit your documents.
